column1: Course Creator Academy,Course Creator Academy is a content creation education platform to help students enhance their videography skills.,In-House,https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=320&h=200&fit=crop&crop=center,TRUE,2024-08-31,https://coursecreatoracademy.org/,"Shopify (Online Store 2.0), Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (custom scripts), Shopify API, Shopify App Integrations (for forms, memberships, and payments), Google Analytics, SEO Optimization Tools","Full-Stack Developer & Systems Architect — handled the full build, theme customization, app integrations, and backend configuration for course management","Course Creator Academy (a division under CLC Collective, founded by Cody Cochran)","4 weeks — from initial planning to launch, including testing and Shopify API integrations","
column3: Integrating a multi-tier membership structure using Shopify’s native system plus third-party apps
Creating a responsive design optimized for both education content and service promotion
Ensuring seamless checkout flow for both physical merchandise and digital/in-person course purchases
Configuring SEO and analytics tracking for both static and dynamic content pages","
column5: Fully functional education & services platform with automated onboarding for new students

column3: Streamlined payment and course access flow that reduced manual admin by 60%
